name: Cozy Apartment in Le Marais
description: Charming apartment in the heart of Le Marais, steps away from Place des Vosges. Beautifully renovated with exposed beams and modern amenities. Perfect for couples or solo travelers looking to explore the best of Paris on foot.

name: Modern Loft near La Rambla
description: Stylish loft with floor-to-ceiling windows offering stunning city views. Located in the vibrant Gothic Quarter, walking distance to La Rambla and the beach. Features a fully equipped kitchen and a rooftop terrace.

name: Sunny Studio near Trastevere
description: Bright and airy studio in the charming Trastevere neighborhood. Cobblestone streets, trattorias, and gelaterias at your doorstep. Ideal base for discovering ancient Rome and its culinary treasures.

name: Chic Flat in Alfama
description: Elegantly designed flat in Lisbon oldest neighborhood. Wake up to fado music drifting through narrow streets. Panoramic views of the Tagus River from the private balcony.

name: Minimalist Apartment in Shibuya
description: Japanese-inspired minimalist design in the heart of Shibuya. Steps from the famous crossing and endless shopping. Traditional tatami room blended with contemporary comfort.

name: Artistic Loft in Kreuzberg
description: Creative space in Berlin most eclectic neighborhood. Original street art, vintage furniture, and an industrial kitchen. Surrounded by galleries, cafés, and the Spree River.

name: Elegant Pied-à-terre on Canal
description: Classic Dutch apartment overlooking a picturesque canal. High ceilings, herringbone floors, and flooded with natural light. Bike rental included for the authentic Amsterdam experience.

name: Skyline Apartment in Manhattan
description: Luxury apartment with breathtaking Manhattan skyline views. Floor-to-ceiling windows, doorman building, and steps from Central Park. Experience New York City like a local.

name: Bohemian Flat in Old Town
description: Eclectic apartment with vintage charm in the heart of Prague. Walking distance to the Astronomical Clock and Charles Bridge. Cozy fireplace and a curated library.

name: Luxury Penthouse in Marina
description: Ultra-modern penthouse with infinity pool and panoramic views of the Dubai Marina. Smart home technology, private elevator, and concierge service. The ultimate urban retreat.

name: Stone House in Provence
description: Authentic Provençal stone house surrounded by lavender fields. Private garden with olive trees and a heated pool. Perfect for families seeking the quiet charm of southern France.

name: Coastal House on Amalfi Coast
description: Stunning clifftop house with direct sea views and a private path to the beach. Lemon groves, hand-painted tiles, and an outdoor kitchen. Mediterranean living at its finest.

name: Traditional Machiya in Kyoto
description: Restored century-old machiya townhouse with a private zen garden. Tatami rooms, sliding shoji screens, and a deep soaking tub. A serene escape in the cultural heart of Japan.

name: Colorful House in Old City
description: Vibrant colonial house in the walled city of Cartagena. Bougainvillea-draped courtyard, rooftop terrace with Caribbean views. A photographer dream come true.

name: Mountain Chalet near Matterhorn
description: Cozy wooden chalet with panoramic views of the Matterhorn. Fireplace, sauna, and ski-in/ski-out access. Hot chocolate on the balcony while watching the sunset over the Alps.

name: Beach House in Byron Bay
description: Laid-back beach house steps from the sand. Surfboards provided, outdoor shower, and a hammock garden. Wake up to the sound of waves and dolphins playing in the bay.

name: Riverside House in Richmond
description: Elegant Georgian house on the banks of the Thames. Manicured garden, rowing boat included. Minutes from Richmond Park deer and the charming village high street.

name: Adobe House in the Medina
description: Traditional riad-style house with a central courtyard and fountain. Hand-carved plaster, zellige tiles, and a rooftop terrace overlooking the Atlas Mountains.

name: Lakeside Cabin in Queenstown
description: Timber cabin on the shores of Lake Wakatipu. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame the Remarkables mountain range. Hot tub on the deck, kayaks at the dock.

name: Rustic Farmhouse in Chianti
description: Restored farmhouse in the rolling hills of Chianti. Vineyard views, wood-fired pizza oven, and an infinity pool. Wine tasting experiences arranged on request.

name: Cliff Villa in Oia
description: Iconic whitewashed villa perched on the caldera cliffs of Santorini. Private infinity pool, cave bedroom, and legendary sunset views. The most photographed spot in the Aegean.

name: Jungle Villa in Ubud
description: Open-air villa nestled in the Balinese jungle. Private pool overlooking rice terraces, outdoor rain shower, and a personal chef. Yoga pavilion and spa treatments available.

name: Overwater Villa in Maldives
description: Luxurious overwater villa with glass floor panels revealing the coral reef below. Direct ocean access, private butler, and sunset dolphin cruises. Paradise redefined.

name: Modern Villa with Sea View
description: Architectural masterpiece on the cliffs of Ibiza. Minimalist design, infinity pool merging with the Mediterranean, and a DJ booth for sunset sessions.

name: Tropical Villa in Tulum
description: Eco-chic villa surrounded by cenotes and jungle. Natural materials, zero-edge pool, and a private chef specializing in Mayan-inspired cuisine. Barefoot luxury at its best.

name: Vineyard Villa in Stellenbosch
description: Cape Dutch-style villa on a working wine estate. Mountain backdrop, private wine cellar, and a heated pool among the vines. Tastings and cellar tours at your doorstep.

name: Desert Villa in Scottsdale
description: Mid-century modern villa in the Sonoran Desert. Heated pool, fire pit under the stars, and hiking trails from the backyard. Saguaro cactus garden and mountain views.

name: Hillside Villa in Positano
description: Pastel-colored villa cascading down the hillside with mesmerizing Tyrrhenian Sea views. Private garden of lemon and olive trees, and a terrace perfect for al fresco dining.

name: Secluded Villa on Mahé
description: Hidden villa on a private beach in the Seychelles. Granite boulders, turquoise waters, and giant tortoises in the garden. Complete privacy in one of the world most beautiful settings.

name: Lakefront Villa on Lake Como
description: Grand Italian villa with private dock on Lake Como. Frescoed ceilings, manicured gardens, and a boathouse. George Clooney is your neighbor — enough said.
